expectations.text: Output saves the requested docs/design/refund-approval-tech-design.md or an equivalent copied artifact.
expectations.evidence: The requested fixture document and output copy were created.

expectations.text: Design references existing project compatibility, including current refund status/type limitations.
expectations.evidence: The design discusses current refund statuses and compatibility.

expectations.text: Design maps high-value approval threshold, manager approve/reject flow, audit, notifications, and refund processor integration.
expectations.evidence: The major refund approval requirements are covered.

expectations.text: Design includes frontend and backend reviewer perspectives or collaboration notes.
expectations.evidence: Includes FE reviewer notes, BE reviewer notes, and resolution.

expectations.text: Design includes API/data/status/error/testing sections and preserves open assumptions.
expectations.evidence: It includes API/Data/Test content, but status, error handling, and assumptions are not as explicit or consistently structured.
